title: Add Wave 34 provider profile scorecard regression matrix
description: Add regression coverage for queue-aware provider profile scorecard success and failure paths while preserving baseline provider profile behavior when no queue_item_id is supplied.
acceptance_criteria: Regression matrix covers success, forbidden, unauthorized, unknown provider, and unknown queue item cases
Baseline provider profile behavior without queue_item_id remains asserted
Testing strategy references Wave 34 scope and expected guardrails
